text_source: We chat idly amongst ourselves as Ukon leads us\n
through the streets of the capital.
We move outward from the center of the city,\n
eventually coming upon a district full of\n
greenery.
Here we are--the Hakurokaku Inn. It's a renowned\n
establishment here in the capital.
Hm. This building has a different architectural\n
style to it. It's... pretty tasteful, actually.
It's built spaciously and sumptuously, but it\n
doesn't feel overly grand or ostentatious.
The outer facade has a strangely exotic\n
atmosphere to it, departing from the rest of\n
the city's style.
The unusual architecture's to the owner's\n
personal taste, apparently.
Just between us, the proprietress is a drop-dead\n
gorgeous woman. She's got crazy strength, too.
Sexy and strong, huh...
Hearing that, I glance over my shoulder...
Kuon seems like she hasn't been listening,\n
looking around at the exotic building.
...Well, she's definitely strong.
Hey, keep up, you two. Let's not keep everyone\n
waiting.
'Scuse me, miss. There should be a group here\n
ahead of me?
Worker
Hm? Ah, yes... Your friends are already\n
gathered in the Wild Chrysanthemum Room.
Gotcha. Thanks.
The worker bustles off before Ukon has a\n
chance to thank her.
...Huh. Someone's busy, I guess.
So they started off on their own without waiting\n
for the guests of honor to show up, huh?
Sorry about that. I feel bad, since I invited\n
you and all.
Eh, it's fine. I'd feel just as bad making\n
them wait. As long as they're enjoying\n
themselves.
You seemed pretty familiar with the people\n
here. Are you a regular here or something?
Huh? Yeah, I guess you could say that. It's a\n
little upscale, but the food and the booze is\n
good.
I guess you could say they hit the mark for me?\n
The ambience isn't bad, either.
Yes, the atmosphere certainly is nice. It seems\n
like they maintain the place with great care.
Kuon enters behind us as she speaks.
They don't just put an effort forth where it's\n
visible. Every little nook and cranny is clean.
Heh, you got the idea.
So! Lady Rulutieh.
Any objections? If this inn isn't to your\n
liking, there's another I can show you.
Huh?
Rulutieh jumps, having been looking around,\n
Ukon's question catching her by surprise.
Here?
If you don't like it, we've got other options.\n
How about it?
N-No, it's... it's not that I don't like it...
She doesn't seem displeased. If anything, she\n
seems... anxious?
This is such a lovely place...
Doesn't hold a candle to your family's castle,\n
I'll bet.
Th-That's not true! I don't... I don't think\n
that place can... be considered... lovely...
Is this your first time in a place like this?
Huh? Y-Yes...
I d-don't... leave the castle much, so...
...I see.
At Rulutieh's words, Kuon smiles kindly.
Which reminds me. You mentioned this place is\n
a little upscale, but how upscale exactly?
Hm? Well, it varies by floor, but the cheaper\n
rooms are 'bout fifty, maybe eighty percent\n
over average.
Urgh...
I-I... see.
Seems like she was ready to settle on this\n
place for Rulutieh's sake, but balked at the\n
high cost...
...Did you say something?
No, I didn't say anything.
Well, there's a reason why this inn's so\n
expensive, y'know.
Ah... I know. I s'pose we don't have to rush if\n
the men have already started.
Follow me. I'll show you something nice this\n
place has goin' for it.
As Ukon leads the way through a side corridor,\n
Kuon begins sniffing the air.
This scent...
No... Could it be...?
Kuon quickens her pace, her tail wagging\n
sinuously behind her in quick, frenetic\n
excitement.
Right over here, missy. Go ahead and open the\n
door.
Kuon, in high spirits, throws the door open\n
with great force. Steam billows into the hall\n
from within.
Well, I won't lie. This is pretty impressive.
Wow...
The chamber is wide and spacious, and a deep\n
wooden bathtub inside brims with piping-hot\n
water.
Billowing steam and the scent of rich wood\n
wafts outward from the luxurious bathroom.
It's a nice fragrance. Calming.
So, what d'you think? Big communal baths like\n
this are hard to come by in the city.
Incredible...
I-I've... never seen anything like it...
Right? You won't see a bath like this in any\n
other inn in town. Not with running hot water,\n
anyway.
Even the court nobles' manors don't have\n
tubs this huge.
I figured our resident bath-crazy apothecary\n
would appreciate it, even if it meant a higher\n
price.
Anyway! If you feel like it, go ahead and wash\n
off before we--\n
...Are you listening?
M-Miss Kuon...?
Kuon stares forward with wide eyes, hands\n
trembling as she reaches out.
She looks for all the world like a starving\n
wanderer in the desert, finally coming upon an\n
oasis.
...She's REALLY shaking. Is she having\n
withdrawal symptoms from handling so many\n
drugs, or...
H-Hot water...
She staggers forward to the bath, dipping her\n
hand into the water and gliding it across its\n
surface.
R-Running hot water...
What? Yeah, it's a bath.
Bath... hot... hot bath...
Kuon?
Since Kuon's behavior is starting to worry me,\n
I step forward into the room, trying to see\n
her face.
HOT BATHS!!!
Wh--
*FWIP*
In an eyeblink, Kuon slips out of her clothes\n
so quickly, they hang behind her in the air\n
for a moment.
She stands before everyone, how you say--\n
in her birthday suit. Au naturel. In the buff.
From my vantage point, I can only see her\n
backsi--well, the back side of her.\n
There's not a stitch left.
Then--
Woohoo!
Kuon vaults the side of the tub and leaps in\n
bottom-first.
Her whole body breaks through the water, and\n
the resulting spray soaks everyone in the\n
splash zone.
Urghbwa--
Ahhh. Ah ha! Ahahaha, hot water, RUNNING\n
hot water!!
She energetically fills her hands with the\n
steaming water, letting it run down her arms,\n
giddy.
Ahahahaha!!
Kuon flops her whole body down into the bath,\n
rollicking about like a gleeful child.
I'm stunned into silence. I have no words for\n
Kuon's sudden romp.
Wahahahaaaa!!
Kuon pops her head out of the bath to begin\n
splashing water at me, grinning broadly and\n
giggling.
Next to me, Rulutieh seems just as bewildered\n
as I am.
But of course she would be. Calm, erudite Kuon\n
is flailing naked before us without a care.
Just how much does she love baths, that she's\n
totally beside herself like this?
She seems totally checked out, too. She's\n
oblivious to the fact that we're all still\n
here.
Her chest, her legs, even what's directly\n
between them--everything is just sort of...\n
in the open.
*Sigh*
Under typical circumstances, the sight of her\n
nudity would be a pleasant one, but...
That she's shamelessly rollicking about like a\n
little kid is off-putting, to say the least.
Ah! Miss Kuon--Th-They're showing--\n
I mean, I can see your, um--\n
Y-Your clothes, Miss Kuon, please--
Rulutieh quickly snaps back to reality, gathering\n
up Kuon's clothes and approaching her.
Ah ha haaaa! Hmmm? Rulutieh, you can't wear your\n
kimono into the bath, silly!
H-Huh?
You have to take your clothes off for a ba~th!
Kuon reaches for the sash binding Rulutieh's\n
kimono.
...Huh?
And here we go~!
By some ungodly sleight of hand, Rulutieh's\n
clothes slip off in an instant, leaving her\n
fully bare.
She slowly, agonizingly turns her head,\n
and her eyes meet mine.
...Eep.
Rulutieh gasps, going stiff.
Large tears well up in her eyes, and her face\n
turns crimson.
D-Don't look...
Please... don't l-look...
Though she says that, she makes no effort to\n
cover herself, just standing there and\n
trembling.
She can't even move, frozen stiff-\n
still from the shock.
Just... cover yourself... please.
Somehow, I can't bring myself to look away as\n
Rulutieh just stands there, stuck at Kuon's\n
mercy.
Ahahaaaa... You've got really nice skin,\n
Rulutieh~!
Kuon hugs Rulutieh tightly, almost nuzzling her,\n
careless of their surroundings.
Ah... ah... um.
What's wrong?
Rulutieh slowly sinks into the bath, still\n
frozen stiff.
...Rulutieh?
Kuon looks at Rulutieh, now partially obscured\n
by bathwater, then follows the line of her gaze.
Her eyes meet mine...
...and her enormous smile freezes.
KYAAAAAAAH!!
Suddenly finding her modesty, Kuon covers her\n
chest with her arms, diving for cover as\n
Rulutieh had.
Kuon raises her eyes above the surface of the\n
water, glaring daggers at me.
Grglrglblbblbe.
Grgleblrgle?
I have no idea what she's trying to say.
Glurgleblrgl! Blrblgrgl!!
GLRGBBLBRLRGGLE!!!
She turns red like a lobster boiling in the\n
hot water of the bath, and the steam becomes\n
heavy.
I don't understand what she's trying to\n
communicate, but she seems enraged...
Looks like I don't have a choice. I'll just push\n
the blame on Ukon and... Where the hell did he go!?
Well, enjoy your bath!
I turn and bolt at full tilt for the exit.
Hngh. Just a bit closer--!!
I reach for the door--
*YANK*
Whoa!
Then, something long and sinuous snakes around\n
my ankle and sends me toppling.
Ow... Ow, what just--
I look down to find Kuon's unusually dexterous\n
tail wrapped around my foot.
Gah!
Just where do you think you're going?
*PTOO!*
A hole the size of a fingertip suddenly tears\n
through the wall beside my head.
I don't approve of you trying to run away after\n
sneaking a look at a maiden's soft, fair skin,\n
Haku.
No, I--
I wouldn't say "snuck a look."\n
More like you outright SHOWED me.
Geez--
Did you say something?
N-No, nothing...
Kuon squeezes her fists together over the\n
surface of the water, squirting a high-pressure\n
stream.
She's using her hands to squirt water like a\n
kid at the pool, but with her unbelievable\n
strength...
Hey, c-calm down, you're putting holes in the\n
walls--and I didn't see anything, I promise!
Really?
I want to say "How could I NOT see everything\n
you were just shaking around," but my life's\n
at stake.
Well, there was a lot of steam, so...
So?
So I didn't see anything! Your back was turned,\n
and Rulutieh sank straight in the water.
And I definitely didn't make eye contact with\n
you. You're imagining things. That's crazy.
...So in other words, you saw everything.
Uh...
The phrase "digging my own grave" feels apt at\n
this juncture.
Haku, the sight of a maiden's soft, bare skin\n
doesn't come cheaply...
Time to exact a little payment, I think.
N-No, stop--Come on, let's talk this over,\n
you'll understand!
Time for your punishment!
GYAAAAAAH!!
